mean_cn: adj.含糊的，模糊的；不明确的；犹豫不决的；茫然的
mean_en: not clear in a person’s mind; not having or giving enough information or details about something; (of a person’s behaviour) suggesting a lack of clear thought or attention; not having a clear shape
sentence: This sign is too vague! I have no idea what it means.
sentence_trans: 这个路标太混乱了，我不知道它到底是什么意思。
